headline: Intel Sinks 6% Even as HSBC Sees 60% Upside, AMD Slides 5% as Chip Stocks Pull Back

headline: AMD (AMD) Unveils Versal Premium Gen 2 For AI And Aerospace Markets
summary: AMD introduced its Versal Premium Gen 2 adaptive SoCs, targeting high bandwidth AI, networking, and aerospace workloads. The new chips bring memory in package technology and expanded security features for data intensive and defense related use cases. Advanced Micro Devices (NasdaqGS:AMD) is extending its reach beyond core CPUs and GPUs with the Versal Premium Gen 2 launch, aimed at customers that need fast, secure data processing. The stock trades at $540.88, with the share price up 4.1%...
